# DIYNEZA

> DIYNEZA is an all-in-one restaurant management platform. It unifies POS & billing, real-time inventory, Kitchen Display System (KDS), QR & tableside ordering, and multi-outlet operations in a single cloud system. Founded by Meghansh Agarwal (Founder & CEO) and Roop Jaiswal (Co-Founder). 45-day free trial, no credit card, cancel anytime.

## Key facts
- Product: Restaurant management software / cloud POS
- Founders: Meghansh Agarwal (Founder & CEO), Roop Jaiswal (Co-Founder)
- Core modules: POS & billing, inventory & recipe costing, KDS, QR/tableside ordering, multi-outlet management, online ordering storefront
- Differentiators: all-in-one platform, 0% commission on direct orders, offline-first billing, 45-day free trial
- Best for: cafes, QSR chains, fine dining, bakeries, cloud kitchens
